title: The Rose at War
notes: Anthology (single author) — no single location, by design. Contents: Forsaken; The Crystal Cathedral; Mercy; The Bloodied Rose; Wreck and Ruin; The Rose in Anger; Da Big Mouf.

curation.synopsis: A collection of Sister Augusta's missions for the Order of the Bloody Rose, gathering the novellas and short stories that follow the Battle Sister across the Imperium's warzones.

rating.reason: OFOB-gap addition (Brief 167) — no Goodreads rating captured in this additive pass; left explicitly unrated.
